_meta.note: Real Gmail API returns body.data as base64url-encoded. Fixture pre-decodes for readability; connector handles both.

messages.snippet: Rachel, Really enjoyed the conversation today — appreciated the sharp questions on net retention and the meterin

headers.name: Subject
headers.value: Thanks for today — Pierside Series A

body.data:
Rachel,

Really enjoyed the conversation today — appreciated the sharp questions on net retention and the metering-accuracy moat. As discussed, I'll send over the updated 90-day cohort breakdown and a re-cut of slide 14 (competitive moat) ahead of the partner meeting next Wednesday. I'll also coordinate two customer reference intros — thinking Verdant Foods and Northwind Pay; Sam is confirming both are available.

Standing by on next steps from your team.

— Maya

Maya Chen | CEO, Pierside
+1 (415) 555-0142
maya@pierside.io

messages.snippet: Maya, Same here — the team came away energized after yesterday. To prep partners for next Wednesday (06-17 at

headers.name: Subject
headers.value: Re: Thanks for today — Pierside Series A

body.data:
Maya,

Same here — the team came away energized after yesterday. To prep partners for next Wednesday (06-17 at 11:00 AM PT), can you send the following by end of week?

  1. 90-day cohort-level reconciliation accuracy %, broken down by customer tier (mid-market / SMB)
  2. A re-cut of slide 14 — partners specifically asked for a sharper articulation of the metering-accuracy moat vs. Metronome / Orb
  3. Warm intros to two customer references (your Verdant Foods + Northwind Pay suggestion is great — fine to start there)

Will look out for materials by Friday. If there's any slip, give me a heads-up so I can manage partner expectations.

Talk Wed,
Rachel

Rachel Goldman
Partner, Northbound Capital
rachel.goldman@northboundcap.com
+1 (212) 555-0188

messages.snippet: Priya, two quick things ahead of our next sync. (1) v2 metering migration timeline — our June reporting close

headers.name: Subject
headers.value: Helix v2 metering timeline + odd dupes in last week's reconciliation

body.data:
Priya,

Two quick things ahead of our next sync.

(1) v2 metering migration timeline — our June reporting close is 06-30 and I'd really like to be on v2 before then. Can you give me a firm date by Monday?

(2) Our analytics team caught what looks like ~40 duplicate event_ids in last week's daily reconciliation report (mostly around the 2 AM batch window). We assumed it was on our end and started investigating, but wanted to flag in case it's something on the Pierside side. Happy to share the event_ids if useful.

Thanks,
Marcus

Marcus Allen | CTO, Helix Health
marcus.allen@helixhealth.com

messages.snippet: Marcus, taking both seriously. Timeline: we're targeting week of 06-22 for Helix on v2; there's a Stripe webho

headers.name: Subject
headers.value: Re: Helix v2 metering timeline + odd dupes in last week's reconciliation

body.data:
Marcus,

Taking both seriously.

(1) Timeline: we're targeting the week of 06-22 for Helix on v2; there's a Stripe webhook setup item we're chasing (waiting on Stripe support — expected Mon 06-15). I'll confirm a firm date for you by EOD Monday.

(2) Dupes: I'll get a written root-cause note to you by Friday. Quick note — you have not been over-billed; events appearing twice in the daily reconciliation view do not double-meter, but I'll confirm in writing.

If you can send the event_ids that would help us cross-check.

— Priya

messages.snippet: Hi Priya, our finance team flagged 47 duplicate event_ids in yesterday's daily reconciliation report. They're

headers.name: Subject
headers.value: Duplicate metering events in Monday's reconciliation report?

body.data:
Hi Priya,

Our finance team flagged 47 duplicate event_ids in yesterday's daily reconciliation report. They're asking whether this means we've been over-billed. Can your team confirm and provide a written explanation by Friday so I can share it back with finance?

Separately — still waiting on the v2 migration timeline you mentioned at our last QBR.

Thanks,
Elena

Elena Vargas | VP Finance, Brightline Mobility
elena.vargas@brightlinemobility.com

messages.snippet: Hi Elena, taking this seriously. Quick assurance first — you have not been over-billed. The events appear twic

headers.name: Subject
headers.value: Re: Duplicate metering events in Monday's reconciliation report?

body.data:
Hi Elena,

Taking this seriously. Quick assurance first — you have not been over-billed. The events appear twice in the daily reconciliation view but are charged once; I'll confirm this in a written root-cause note to you by EOD Friday (06-12).

On the v2 migration: targeting week of 06-22 pending a Stripe webhook setup item we're chasing. I'll confirm a firm date by Mon 06-15.

— Priya

messages.snippet: Sam — small thing, our weekly review caught a handful of duplicate event_ids in the Wednesday reconciliation r

headers.name: Subject
headers.value: Quick — odd dupes in daily report + Mon 06-15 call shift

body.data:
Sam,

Two small things.

1) Our weekly review caught a handful of duplicate event_ids in the Wed reconciliation report. Probably nothing, but flagging in case you're seeing it elsewhere.

2) Our internal hardware migration just shifted timelines — can we move our Wed call to Mon 06-15 09:00 PT? Will give you v2 migration window thinking on the call.

Thanks,
Dan

Dan Kowalski | Sr Platform Eng, Vesta Logistics

messages.snippet: Hi Naomi — sorry to reach out direct, but we've been blocked on Stripe support ticket #cs-9924 (signing-secret

headers.name: Subject
headers.value: Help unblock pierside staging webhook signing secret (#cs-9924)

body.data:
Hi Naomi,

Sorry to reach out direct. We've been blocked on Stripe support ticket #cs-9924 (signing-secret whitelist for pierside staging) since Mon 06-08 — Alex filed it and we haven't heard back. It's now blocking two customer rollouts (Helix Health and Brightline Mobility) on our v2 metering pipeline.

Any chance you can nudge the right team? Happy to escalate via partnerships if that's a better path.

Thanks,
Devin

Devin Park | CTO, Pierside

messages.snippet: Thanks for your message. I am out of office and will return Monday, June 15. For urgent customer escalations p

headers.name: Subject
headers.value: Auto-Reply: Re: Help unblock pierside staging webhook signing secret (#cs-9924)

body.data:
Thanks for your message.

I am out of office and will return Monday, June 15. I'll have very limited access to email until then.

For urgent customer escalations, please contact partnerships@stripe.com or your account team.

— Naomi Patel
Sr Solutions Engineer, Stripe
